name: emulate
description: Local drop-in API emulator for Vercel, GitHub, Google, Slack, Apple, Microsoft, and AWS.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 emulate 相關工作
幫我啟用 emulate 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 emulate

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the emulate skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
